creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 161076
change of websites

The project changed its website, the old one doesn't work. The attached patch changes MASTER_SITES and Website (in pkg-descr) to the official one. It also add Dropbox mirrors (links from the project website) and makes fetch look at http://update.cooltrainer.org/abgx360 only for the png file (since abgx360gui-1.0.2.tar.gz doesn't seem to be there).
